message:
feat(connector-sdk): add devkit with builders, linting, certification pipeline, and simulator

Implements ft-3681t.5.10 — Connector SDK/devkit module providing:
- ManifestBuilder/TrustPolicyBuilder/SandboxBuilder: fluent APIs for manifest construction
- ManifestLinter: 12 lint rules (empty fields, semver, digest format, risky capability combos)
- CertificationPipeline: 6-phase validation (schema → lint → digest → capability → trust → integration)
- ConnectorSimulator: in-memory lifecycle harness for dev-test cycles
- CertificationTelemetry: counters for pipeline health monitoring
- 40+ unit tests covering builders, linting, certification, simulation, serde roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
